title: NIT Rourkela Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: National Institute of Technology (NIT) Rourkela has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the 21 vacancies for Junior Research Fellow Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, and Ph.D can grab this chance and apply for the NIT Rourkela Recruitment 202 6. Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply ...
